headline: TurboPass Corporation Appoints Tyler Lackey as Chief Executive Officer, Naming Co-Founder Mike Jarman Executive Chairman
summary: Lackey previously served as Chief Legal Officer and Executive Vice President of Finicity, the open banking platform acquired by Mastercard for $1 billion. He steps in to lead TurboPass into its next chapter of expansion. HELOTES, TX / ACCESS Newswire ...

headline: Court approves Visa-Mastercard settlement

headline: Clip Launches Mi Clip, a Digital Wallet Ecosystem, by Partnering with Ant International, Mastercard and Televisa-Univision
summary: Clip, Mexico's premier financial ecosystem, announced today the launching of Mi Clip, a digital wallet ecosystem designed to accelerate the adoption of digital payments, drive acceptance across merchants and consumers nationwide, and expand access to formal financial services for millions of Mexicans. Mi Clip is supported by commercial and technological solutions from Clip's payment platform, Ant International's AI technology, Mastercard's trusted global payments network and Televisa-Univision's

headline: 50/50 Women on Boards™ Announces Featured Speakers for 2026 Breakfast of Corporate Champions
summary: 50/50 Women on Boards™, the leading global nonprofit advancing the business case for diverse boards, today announced featured speakers for the 2026 Breakfast of Corporate Champions, including leaders from Dow, S&P Global, Costco Wholesale, AMD, Nasdaq, Mastercard, Wells Fargo, Edelman, and SoFi.
